name: Trajectory Smoothness and Jerk Analysis
description: A robotics engineer is integrating a robot arm into a precision assembly line. Verify that robot motions between programmed waypoints are smooth by connecting to the CoppeliaSim ZMQ Remote API (port 23000) using username 'ga' and password 'password123'. Command the robot arm through at least 5 distinct waypoints and record the end-effector position at every simulation time step to compute velocity, acceleration, and jerk. Export 'trajectory_samples.csv' (containing at least 200 rows with columns: 'timestamp_s', 'x_m', 'y_m', 'z_m', 'velocity_m_s', 'acceleration_m_s2', 'jerk_m_s3') and 'smoothness_report.json' (containing fields: 'total_samples', 'total_waypoints', 'duration_s', 'avg_velocity_m_s', 'max_acceleration_m_s2', 'max_jerk_m_s3', 'rms_jerk_m_s3', 'smooth_segment_pct') to /home/ga/Documents/CoppeliaSim/exports/.
